name: Pumpkin Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafers and margarine; press into bottom and sides of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. In a bowl, mix the softened Neufchatel cheese with half the sugar and vanilla until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each addition.
4. Reserve some of this mixture. To the remaining cheese mixture, add 1 cup of pumpkin, the rest of the sugar, and spices, then stir well.
5. Spread half of the pumpkin mixture over the crust, followed by half of the reserved Neufchatel mixture.
6. Repeat with the other layers.
7. Use a knife to cut through the batter several times for a marble effect.
8. Bake at 350°F for 55 minutes.
9. Remove from the pan and let cool before refrigerating. Serves 10-12.
Note: From package of Light Philadelphia Brand Neufchatel Cheese.
